overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player walks along wet streets past towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and corporate architecture with heavy use of cyan and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange tactile sidewalk past graffiti-covered metal shutters

entered.detail: distinctive orange textured pavement with geometric patterns
building facade with closed corrugated metal shutters covered in graffiti
concrete wall with colorful spray paint graffiti tags
tall street lamp with warm yellow light
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow futuristic city sidewalk with distinctive orange tactile paving. The camera moves forward past closed storefronts with metal shutters covered in graffiti, while tall street lamps cast warm light on the wet pavement. Digital billboards glow in the distance between towering skyscrapers.

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into open intersection crosswalk with yellow stripes
turns left at the intersection toward the corporate plaza archway

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street and turning left at the intersection toward the corporate district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair standing at the crosswalk edge waiting to cross

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt
large architectural archway with green neon signage marking the corporate plaza entrance
bright green illuminated corporate signage on the archway structure
massive curved skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes on the wet asphalt. The camera passes a stationary pedestrian with red hair at the crosswalk edge, then turns left toward a massive archway entrance marked with green neon corporate signage. A towering curved building rises in the background while sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza street with overhead lighting

events.description: passes under the corporate archway into the narrower plaza street

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet pavement past corporate buildings and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern concrete and glass building front with illuminated windows
large wall-mounted digital screen displaying animated advertisements
red and white striped construction barrier along the street edge

segments.scene_description: Passing under the corporate archway, the scene transitions to a narrower street lined with modern corporate architecture. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the overhead street lights while digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves past traffic barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban corridor with illuminated billboards

events.description: enters area with dense neon billboard lighting creating colorful reflections

agents.ego_description: walking past brightly lit digital advertisements and neon signs on the building walls

entered.detail: series of large bright digital advertisement screens showing various products
vertical yellow neon lighting strips along the building facade
high-rise building with glass exterior reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The corridor narrows further into a dense urban canyon dominated by bright neon billboards and yellow light strips on the right wall. The wet pavement reflects the vivid cyan and magenta glows from the advertisements. Tall glass towers rise on both sides, creating an enclosed feeling as the camera moves deeper into the corporate district.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: looking up at the towering buildings while continuing to walk forward through the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall building facade with grid of illuminated windows rising high above
horizontal neon light fixtures spanning across the street overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the deepest part of the urban canyon, with the camera tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers stretching into the night sky. Overhead neon lights span the street while the wet pavement reflects the dense array of illuminated windows and signage. The scene emphasizes the vertical scale of the futuristic city architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty urban sidewalk into the towering, neon-drenched depths of a corporate district. It begins on a narrow path with orange tactile paving and graffiti-covered shutters, moving forward under warm street lamps toward distant glowing billboards. As the camera reaches a wide intersection with yellow crosswalks, it passes a red-haired pedestrian before turning left through a massive archway marked by green corporate signage. The scene then shifts into a narrower street of modern architecture and reflective concrete, eventually tightening into a dense urban canyon where vivid cyan and magenta neon lights saturate the wet pavement. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the immense vertical scale of glass skyscrapers and overhead lights stretching into the night sky.
